zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Egerton於1299年出生在英國英格蘭爾艾格頓時，她的父親Phillip de Egerton45歲，母親Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x40歲。她於大約1315年與David de Malpas在英國爾艾格頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1362年享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Egerton于1299年出生在英国英格兰爾艾格頓时，她的父亲Phillip de Egerton45岁，母亲Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x40岁。她于大约1315年与David de Malpas在英国爾艾格頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1362年享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Egerton was born in 1299, in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Phillip de Egerton, was 45 and her mother, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, was 40. She married David de Malpas about 1315, in Egerton, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1362, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Egerton est née en 1299, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Phillip d’Egerton, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé David de Malpas environ 1315, à Egerton, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1362, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Egerton 1299 in Egerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Phillip de Egerton 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x 40. Sie hat um 1315 in Egerton, Cheshire, England David de Malpas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1362 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Egerton è nata il nel 1299 nel Egerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Phillip de Egerton, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato David de Malpas circa 1315, nel Egerton, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1362, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Egertonが1299年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父Phillip de Egertonは45歳，母Lady Margaret De Wrenbury xは40歳であった。約1315年にイギリスチェシュアイアエジャートンでDavid de Malpasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1362年に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Egerton(이)가 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 거턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Phillip de Egerton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1315년 영국 체실르 거턴에서 David de Malpas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1362년 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Egerton nasceu em 1299, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Phillip de Egerton, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com David de Malpas aproximadamente 1315, em Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1362, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Egerton родилась в 1299 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Phillip de Egerton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David de Malpas около 1315 г. в местности эгиртон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1362 г. в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Egerton nació en 1299, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Phillip de Egerton, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret De Wrenbury x, tenía 40 años. Se casó con David de Malpas aproximadamente 1315, en Egerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1362, a la edad de 63 años.
